news.title: Workshop Announced
news.content: We are pleased to announce the Digital Finance for Supervision workshop, organized by the MSCA DIGITAL network at the European Central Bank on December 3, 2026.

news.title: Call for Papers Open
news.content: We invite researchers to submit extended abstracts on AI/ML for bank supervision, NLP for regulatory reporting, and LLMs in supervision. Deadline: October 1, 2026.

news.title: Website Launch
news.content: The official workshop website is now live. Visit for program details, committee information, and registration.
